svg.title: Friendship Comedy Cartoon - The 200 Rupees Story
svg.desc: A Tamil friendship comedy cartoon about a girl, her best friend, a bike ride, marriage advice, 200 rupees, and a happy ending
svg.text: Scene 2 — Best Friend Advice Mode ON 🎤
Few Years Later — Annual Roast Session 😂
உனக்கு எப்பவும் ஒரு alagana boy கிடைக்கட்டும் — always santhosama, happya இரு! 💚
